scenario_config.name: before_query_cache_realistic_school_day
_comparison_notes: and traffic shape; only difference is the dummy-cache overlay, which
switches Django CACHES to DummyCache so dashboard query caching is
disabled. Every dashboard query hits the DB.
This is a READ-heavy comparison — look at pre_benchmark/post_benchmark
analytics latency and the dashboard/analytics/turn_insights k6 check
latencies; the ingest path is unaffected by this overlay.
Run both and diff via benchmarks/compare_reports.py.
